calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez (212)

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-23-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carl Salcedo.
Philip A. Segal, Esq. for Petitioner: Bela Woldai, present as Guardian at litem for: Robell Admasu, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $2,575.00
Medical Expenses $1,007.92
Costs $700.00
A net balance of $6,717.08 to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Frago Bank, 1335 Webster St., San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
